title: PlaceGeometry Node
description: Time-bounded spatial geometry for a Place. A Place may have multiple geometries representing different periods (e.g., city walls expanding over centuries). Sources: Pleiades locations[], Wikidata P625/P3896.

geometry_id.description: Unique identifier, pattern: geo_{pleiades_id}_{index} or geo_{qid}_{index}

latitude.description: Representative point latitude (WGS84). Required for point type.

longitude.description: Representative point longitude (WGS84). Required for point type.

bbox.description: Bounding box as [minLon, minLat, maxLon, maxLat]

geojson.description: Full GeoJSON geometry string for polygons, polylines, multipolygons. Consumed directly by map renderers (Leaflet, Mapbox, Deck.gl).

start_year.description: Year this geometry becomes valid. Negative for BCE.

end_year.description: Year this geometry ceases to be valid. Negative for BCE.

precision.description: Spatial precision qualifier from source data

source_id.description: Identifier in the source system (pleiades location URI, Wikidata statement ID)

accuracy_radius_m.description: Accuracy radius in meters, from Pleiades accuracy assessment
